name: Competitor Price Drop + Inventory Surplus
description: Market pressure plus overstock creates margin and capacity crisis

input_signals.content: Market intelligence report: Competitor TechMart reduced prices across electronics category by 20% starting Monday. Social media tracking shows 340% increase in TechMart brand mentions this week. Three key SKUs now priced 25% below our current retail.

Warehouse operations report: Karachi warehouse at 94% capacity. Electronics inventory represents 60 days of stock versus our 30-day target. Perishable tech accessories category at risk of expiry within 45 days. Storage overage fees kicking in next month.
